title: lopezia miniata subsp. hintonii
intro: Lopezia miniata subsp. hintonii, also known as Hinton's Lopezia, is a flowering plant species in the evening primrose family that is native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Lopezia miniata subsp. hintonii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies.
